creator: stefan@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi Vlad,

the port leaves files behind upond deinstallation:

=== Checking filesystem state after all packages deleted
================================================================
list of extra files and directories in / (not present on clean system but present after everything was deinstalled)
11240707       28 drwxr-xr-x    3 root             wheel               13824 Aug 31 13:14 usr/local/lib/python2.7
1607935        4 drwxr-xr-x    3 root             wheel                 512 Aug 31 13:14 usr/local/lib/python2.7/site-packages
2215893        4 drwxr-xr-x    3 root             wheel                2048 Aug 31 13:14 usr/local/lib/python2.7/site-packages/duplicity
2216009        4 drwxr-xr-x    2 root             wheel                1536 Aug 31 13:14 usr/local/lib/python2.7/site-packages/duplicity/backends
2216015       16 -rw-r--r--    1 root             wheel                7659 Jun 18 13:53 usr/local/lib/python2.7/site-packages/duplicity/backends/u1backend.py
2216060       16 -rw-r--r--    1 root             wheel                7538 Aug 31 13:14 usr/local/lib/python2.7/site-packages/duplicity/backends/u1backend.pyc
2216104       16 -rw-r--r--    1 root             wheel                7430 Aug 31 13:14 usr/local/lib/python2.7/site-packages/duplicity/backends/u1backend.pyo
================================================================

Could you investigate and send an updated patch?

Regards,
Stefan
